leadText: Natural Gift (Japanese: しぜんのめぐみ Nature's Blessing) is a Normal-type move introduced in Generation IV. It was TM83 in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation IV 1.2 Generation V to VII 1.3 Generation VIII onwards 1.4 Power Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Natural Gift inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Natural Gift's power and type vary depending on the user's held Berry . Using Natural Gift consumes the held Berry, even if the move fails due to accuracy miss. The move will fail if the user is not holding a Berry, or if it cannot use its held Berry (due to Klutz , Magic Room , or Embargo ). Natural Gift is affected by Normalize . Generation V to VII [ edit | edit source ] Natural Gift is unaffected by Normalize, Pixilate , Refrigerate , and Aerilate . However, it is affected by Ion Deluge (if the move would be Normal-type) and Electrify . If a Red Card forces the user to leave the battlefield, the Berry is not consumed. If Powder prevents the move from being executed, the Berry is not consumed. If Natural Gift cannot be fully executed due to heavy rain (for the Fire -type damage) or extremely harsh sunlight (for the Water -type damage), the Berry is not consumed. Consuming a berry via Natural Gift does not interact with Unnerve , Cheek Pouch , or Belch . Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Natural Gift cannot be selected in a battle. Power [ edit | edit source ] The type and power of Natural Gift vary as follows. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power. (move) The user draws power from the Berry it is holding to attack. The Berry determines its type and power. (TM) PBR B W B2 W2 The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines the move's type and power. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D Inflicts damage on the target. The move's type and power will change, based on the kind of Berry the user is holding, if any. MD S Inflicts damage on the target. The move's type and power will change based on the kind of Berry the user is holding, if any. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる きのみを もっていると わざの タイプや いりょくが かわる MD GtI It damages an enemy. The move's type and power will change based on the kind of Berry you are holding, if any. S MD The move's type changes, and its power goes up if you're carrying an item. MD RT DX It damages an enemy. If you're holding food, such as Berries or seeds, the move's type will change and the power will go up.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] For the Cram-o-matic , every Berry uses the same type as the type the Natural Gift gets converted to with that Berry, and its value correlates to Natural Gift's power in Generation VII : 2 Cram-o-matic points: 80 power, except damage-reducing Berries and Berries that may cause confusion 4 Cram-o-matic points: 80 power, only damage-reducing Berries and Berries that may cause confusion 6 Cram-o-matic points: 90 power 10 Cram-o-matic points: 100 power
